sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82159" key="perispoggismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισπογγ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n82159.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sponging all over</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ προσώπου</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:[2:28]" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">[2.28]</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
